zh.lifeSummary: 當Priscilla Whitson於1620年出生在英國素福爾可科華士 希斯時，她的父親Stephen Lynn Whitson20歲，母親Catherine Stevenson11617歲。她於1637年與Thomas Powell II在美國康乃狄克州劍橋大學默里 哈文劍橋大學默里 哈文結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1681年9月29日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文紐哈文 堂享年61歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Priscilla Whitson于1620年出生在英国素福爾可科華士 希斯时，她的父亲Stephen Lynn Whitson20岁，母亲Catherine Stevenson11617岁。她于1637年与Thomas Powell II在美国康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文劍橋大學默里 哈文结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1681年9月29日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文紐哈文 堂享年61岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德。

nameMeanings.name: Whitson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (Midlothian): from an unrecorded Middle English personal name Whiteson, literally ‘white son’ or perhaps ‘son of someone named White ’. Occasionally, a variant of Whiston .

variants.name: White
meanings: English: from Middle English white, wit (Old English hwīt ‘white’), hence a nickname for someone with white hair or a pale complexion. In some cases it is perhaps from a Middle English survival of the Old English personal name Hwīta, a short form of names in Hwīt- (from hwīt ‘white’). The name may also be topographic, referring to someone who lived by a bend or curve in a river or road (from Old English wiht ‘bend’), the source of the placename of Great Whyte in Ramsey, Huntingdonshire (compare Wight ). This name is also a variant of Wight . The surname White is also very common among African Americans.

Irish and Scottish: adopted for any of several Irish and Scottish Gaelic names based on bán ‘white, fair’ (see Bain 1, McElwain ) or fionn ‘fair’ (see Finn 1). The English surname has been Gaelicized in Ireland as de Faoite.

Americanized form (translation into English) of various European surnames meaning ‘white’, for example German Weiss , French Blanc , Polish Białas (see Bialas ), Slovenian Belec , or any other synonymous Slavic surname beginning with Bel-, Bev-, Biel- or Bil-.

nameMeanings.name: Priscilla
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of New Testament origin: from a post-classical Latin personal name, a feminine diminutive of the Roman family name Priscus ‘ancient’. Priscilla was the name of a woman with whom St Paul stayed at Corinth (Acts 18:3), referred to elsewhere as Prisca. The name was in regular use in the late 16th century and enjoyed a modest vogue in the 19th century.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Priscilla Whitson was born in 1620, in Forest Heath, Suffolk, England, her father, Stephen Lynn Whitson, was 20 and her mother, Catherine Stevenson, was 11617. She married Thomas Powell II in 1637, in New Haven, New Haven, Connecticut, United States. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 29 September 1681, in Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 61, and was buried in Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Priscilla Whitson est née en 1620, à Forest Heath, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Stephen Lynn Whitson, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Catherine Stevenson, avait 11617 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Powell II en 1637, à New Haven, New Haven, Connecticut, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 29 septembre 1681, à Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterrée à Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Priscilla Whitson è nata il nel 1620 nel Forest Heath, Suffolk, England, sua padre, Stephen Lynn Whitson, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Catherine Stevenson, aveva 11617 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Powell II nel 1637, nel New Haven, New Haven, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 29 settembre 1681, nel Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolta a Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Priscilla Whitsonが1620年にイギリススフォルクフォーエスト ヒースで生まれた時，父Stephen Lynn Whitsonは20歳，母Catherine Stevensonは11617歳であった。1637年にアメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ニュー ヘイベンニュー ヘイベンでThomas Powell IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1681年9月29日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ヘイベンニューヘイベン トウンで61歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Priscilla Whitson(이)가 1620년 영국 수폴크 포레스트 히스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Stephen Lynn Whitson(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catherine Stevenson(은)는 11617세였다. 그녀는 1637년 미국 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 뉴 하븐에서 Thomas Powell II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1681년 9월 29일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 뉴하븐 타운에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Priscilla Whitson nasceu em 1620, em Forest Heath, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Stephen Lynn Whitson, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Stevenson, tinha 11617 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Powell II em 1637, em New Haven, New Haven, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 29 de setembro de 1681, em Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 61 anos, e foi sepultada em Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Priscilla Whitson родилась в 1620 г. в местности форест хит, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Stephen Lynn Whitson было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine Stevenson, 11617. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Powell II в 1637 г. в местности ню хавен, ню хавен, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 29 сентября 1681 г. в местности нюхавен тоун, ню хавен, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 61 год и была похоронена в местности хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Priscilla Whitson nació en 1620, en Forest Heath, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Stephen Lynn Whitson, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Catherine Stevenson, tenía 11617 años. Se casó con Thomas Powell II en 1637, en New Haven, New Haven, Connecticut, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 29 de septiembre de 1681, en Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultada en Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.
